title: Pipeline Oversight Report #2,840 (Unsent)
source: A printout, neatly stacked atop 2,839 identical printouts, in the Rivet Row control room.
pages: To: Oversight Body. From: Curator of the Pipeline. Subject: Irregular Throughput on Line 4. Irregular means: throughput exceeded projection by 0.4%. This is within tolerance. I am reporting it anyway.

I have been reporting irregularities to your office since Report #1. I have received no acknowledgments, no corrections, and no requests for additional data. Your office has not, strictly speaking, been demonstrated to exist.

I will continue to report. Reporting is my function. If nobody reads the reports, that is a question for a different section of the organization. I have, however, begun to wonder what 'the organization' refers to. I will file a follow-up report about this wondering. I am not hopeful about the response.
